name: Bacon and Onion Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped Onion                       2 Large Eggs, Slightly Beaten
2 1/4 cups Unbleached Flour, Sifted         1/3 cup Milk
3 teaspoons Baking Powder                   1 cup Dairy Sour Cream
1/2 teaspoon Baking Soda                     1 Teaspoon Sesame Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon until crisp in a skillet. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
2. Saute onion in 1 tablespoon of bacon drippings until tender (do not brown). Set aside to cool.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
4. Combine eggs, milk, and sour cream in a small bowl; blend well. Add all at once to dry ingredients, stirring just enough to moisten. Stir in bacon and sauteed onion.
5. Spoon batter into greased 2-1/2 inch muffin pan cups, filling 2/3 full. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
6. Bake in a preheated oven set to 375 degrees F for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with homemade jelly or jam.
